title: How to Steal Customers From Giants 600x Bigger than Your Startup | Pigment, Eléonore Crespo
summary: Eléonore Crespo, co-founder of Pigment, discusses how her AI performance management platform enables unified data visibility across finance, supply chain, HR, and sales functions. She argues that enterprise-scale planning spreadsheets fail at scale, advocates for building complete platforms rather than single features, and emphasizes hiring discipline and trusted customer validation as keys to competing against established players.
writeup: Eléonore Crespo, co-founder of Pigment, explains how the AI performance management platform unifies data across finance, supply chain, HR, and sales functions. She argues that enterprise-scale planning spreadsheets break down at scale, making the case for building complete platforms rather than single features. The takeaways for competing against far larger incumbents: hiring discipline and trusted customer validation.
